name: m2m-log-monitor
description: Monitors error/warning logs, dyno health, and maintenance mode across the m2m/lca/mlc Heroku fleet, alerting to Slack. Run on a 6-hour Heroku Scheduler job.

HEROKU_API_KEY.description: Heroku Platform API token for an account/collaborator with access to every monitored app

SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL.description: Incoming Webhook URL for the #m2m-system-alerts Slack channel

REPORT_WARNINGS.description: Set to 'true' to also report warning-level log lines, not just errors

LOG_SESSION_LINES.description: Number of recent log lines to fetch per app per run

DRY_RUN.description: Set to 'true' to print Slack payloads instead of sending them (for manual testing)
